title: Freeze the top row in My work?
excerpt: Hey monday.com, it would be amazing if we could freeze top row in My Work, like in Excel. As we scroll down, the data is lost. This is something one of my clients would really like they have Dyslexia, so sometimes they s…

posts.author: AntoinetteForbes (Antoinette Forbes)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey monday.com, it would be amazing if we could freeze top row in My Work, like in Excel. As we scroll down, the data is lost. This is something one of my clients would really like they have Dyslexia, so sometimes they simply get lost in the column and what data they are reviewing. This feature would be super helpful to them.
